'''Hovarb Devist''' was a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]].

He was part of a sleeper cell of Fel clones planted by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] on the planet [[Pakrik Minor]]. He later met all of the other members of their sleeper cell, [[Dobrow Devist|Dobrow]], [[Carib Devist|Carib]], [[Sabmin Devist|Sabmin]] and [[Tabric Devist|Tabric]]. He along with all other members of [[Jenth-44]] opted to aid the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] on the grounds that they be left alone.
